commit_message:
[kmac, rtl] Fixes to invalid sideload key error state handling [kmac, rtl] Fixes to invalid sideload key error state handling I found that `kmac-mubi-err`, `kmac-sideload-invalid`, and `kmac-key-error` DV tests were failing. The bugs were introduced in #13 but only the App Intf tests were run at the time. A full regression run has been completed to diagnose these remaining failing test cases.

### kmac-mubi-err
The test was failing due to an assertion that digest share0 and share1 were not 0
